    2. Quick Start
    3. Installation
    • Copy page
    • View source

    Installation#

    Python Version#

    Supports Python 3.12 and newer.

    Dependencies#

    • cryptography is a package providing cryptographic primitives, in this library used to sign API requests.

    • lxml is a Pythonic XML library binding. It is used to parse API responses.

    • requests is a simple HTTP library used to interact with the LabArchives API.

    Install#

    We recommend using uv to install labapi.

    uv add labapi

    poetry add labapi

    pip install labapi

    Optional Dependencies#

    labapi comes with two optional dependency groups:

    builtin-auth

    This group of dependencies allows the default_authenticate() function to open browser windows for higher quality-of-life when running locally.

    uv add labapi --optional builtin-auth

    poetry install labapi --with builtin-auth

    pip install 'labapi[builtin-auth]'
    dotenv

    This group of dependencies allows the Client constructor to use environment variables specified in the .env file in a project.

    uv add labapi --optional dotenv

    poetry install labapi --with dotenv

    pip install 'labapi[dotenv]'
